zh.Portledge, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文波特萊其
zh.lifeSummary: 當James Coffin於大約1538年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon44歲，母親Wilmot Chudleigh34歲。他於1533年與Mary Cole在英國英格蘭戴文波特萊其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1566年12月15日在英國享年29歲。

zh-hans.Portledge, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文波特萊其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Coffin于大约1538年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon44岁，母亲Wilmot Chudleigh34岁。他于1533年与Mary Cole在英国英格兰戴文波特萊其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1566年12月15日在英国享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern England, of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Middle English cofin, coffin, Old French cof(f)in (from Late Latin cophinus, Greek kophinos) ‘container, basket; coffer, chest (for keeping treasures, documents, armour, etc.)’. Early bearers of this as a hereditary surname were of knightly rank. Old French cofin was synonymous with coffer, and it may be that Cofin was used to denote a keeper of the (royal) coffer, attested in Anglo-Latin cofferarius. Compare Coffer . The modern English word coffin is a specialized development of this term, not attested until the 16th century.
History: Tristram Coffin came from Brixham, Devon, to Haverhill, MA, before 1647. An important line of his descendants is associated with Nantucket and Martha's Vineyard.

variants.name: Coffer
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English cofre, coffre, coffer ‘box, chest’ (from Old French cof(f)rehere), used to denote a box or coffer maker (Old French coffrier), perhaps also for a treasurer.
Probably also an Americanized form of German Kaufer or Kauffer.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When James Coffin was born about 1538, in Devon, England, his father, Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon, was 44 and his mother, Wilmot Chudleigh, was 34. He married Mary Cole in 1533, in Portledge, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 15 December 1566, in England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Coffin est né environ 1538, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Wilmot Chudleigh, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Mary Cole en 1533, à Portledge, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1566, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Coffin um 1538 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon 44 und seine Mutter Wilmot Chudleigh 34. Er hat 1533 in Portledge, Devon, England, United Kingdom Mary Cole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1566 im Alter von 29 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Coffin è nato il circa 1538 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Wilmot Chudleigh, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Mary Cole nel 1533, nel Portledge, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 15 dicembre 1566, nel England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Coffinが約1538年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devonは44歳，母Wilmot Chudleighは34歳であった。1533年にイギリスイギリスデボンポルトレッジでMary Coleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1566年12月15日にイギリスで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Coffin(이)가 대략 1538년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Wilmot Chudleigh(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1533년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 포틀레지에서 Mary Cole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1566년 12월 15일 영국에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Coffin nasceu aproximadamente 1538, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Wilmot Chudleigh, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Cole em 1533, em Portledge, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1566, em Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Coffin родился около 1538 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Wilmot Chudleigh, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Cole в 1533 г. в местности портледж, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 15 декабря 1566 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Coffin nació aproximadamente 1538, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Coppin Jr. Sherriff Devon, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Wilmot Chudleigh, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Mary Cole en 1533, en Portledge, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1566, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
